title: linosyris refracta
intro: Linosyris refracta, a perennial plant native to the Himalayas and the eastern parts of India, is also known as the "Sarpgandha" and is a member of the family Apocynaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce anxiety, insomnia, and other nervous disorders due to its sedative and anti-anxiety effects. The health benefits of Linosyris refracta include its potential to alleviate symptoms of depression, improve sleep quality, and reduce stress levels. The herbal preparations of Linosyris refracta typically involve drying and powdering the roots, which can then be used to make teas, capsules, or tinctures for consumption.
